hero.subtitle: Become a co-owner of premium beachfront properties in Zanzibar from just $100.
hero.description: Build wealth through fractional ownership of African real estate.

stats.title: A booming market, backed by real numbers
stats.rental_yield_desc: Zanzibar's booming tourism industry ensures strong rental demand year-round.
stats.property_growth_desc: Property values in premium areas have consistently appreciated over the past five years.
stats.occupancy_rate_desc: Our managed properties maintain exceptional occupancy during high season.
stats.tagline: Invest smart. Start local. Grow global.

why.title: Real Estate Investment Reimagined
why.subtitle: Premium properties, fractional access, full transparency. We've stripped away every barrier that kept African real estate out of reach.
why.low_entry_desc: Start investing from just $100, making premium real estate accessible to everyone — not just the wealthy.
why.hands_off_desc: No property management headaches. Our professional team handles maintenance, guest relations, and everything in between.
why.quarterly_desc: Receive regular rental income from premium vacation properties, distributed every quarter, proportional to your investment.
why.exit_desc: Easily resell your shares on our secondary market, or reinvest in new properties whenever you're ready.

how.title: How the Platform Works
how.subtitle: Five simple steps to become a co-owner of African real estate.
how.browse_desc: Explore carefully selected premium properties starting in Zanzibar, with detailed information, real photos, video tours, and transparent analytics.
how.invest_desc: Choose your investment amount starting from just $100, with no hidden fees, no complicated paperwork, and KYC done in 5 minutes.
how.own_desc: Your contribution is converted into legal shares of the property, secured by blockchain technology and held in escrow until the funding target is reached.
how.earn_desc: Receive quarterly rental income proportional to your ownership share, directly to your FURSA wallet. Track everything in real time on your dashboard.
how.exit_desc: Resell your shares on the secondary market at any time, or reinvest in new properties. You're never locked in.

partners.title: Curated properties, expert-managed
partners.subtitle: FURSA partners with the most respected real estate developers and operators in Zanzibar to bring you verified, high-yield properties.
partners.paje_square_desc: Modern contemporary residences in Paje. Studios, 1 and 2 bedroom apartments designed for the island lifestyle.
partners.fumba_town_desc: Eco-friendly new town designed by CPS Africa. International community and modern infrastructure in southern Zanzibar.
partners.africa_bahari_desc: Local real estate expertise across Zanzibar and East Africa. Deep market knowledge for sourcing and due diligence.
partners.cps_zanzibar_desc: Property management and guest operations. Maintains 95% occupancy during high season on FURSA-managed properties.
partners.seed_innov_desc: Blockchain infrastructure and secure payment rails. Powers FURSA's fractional ownership ledger and quarterly distributions.
partners.reassurance: Together, we're building a secure, transparent platform for the future of African real estate investment. Every property is independently verified before tokenization (legal documents, certification, guided video tour).

movement.title: FURSA is not just a platform — it's a movement
movement.subtitle: We believe owning a piece of Africa should be accessible to everyone, whether you're in Nairobi, Paris, Lagos, or Toronto. We're turning renters into owners, dreamers into stakeholders, and enabling the African diaspora to become collective builders of the future.
movement.vision: We imagine a continent where the next generation inherits not just hopes, but equity — homes, assets, and foundations for generational wealth.
movement.tech_savvy: Tech-savvy backers who believe in Africa's potential
movement.real_estate_pros: Real estate professionals seeking innovative models
movement.diaspora: Diaspora allies wanting to invest back home
movement.testimonial_quote: Real estate shouldn't be reserved for the few. With FURSA, I can own part of something real. And African.

confiance.title: Invest with confidence
confiance.subtitle: Six concrete commitments so your investment is as safe as it is profitable.
confiance.certified_desc: Every property is physically inspected, legal documents verified, and validated by our team before publication.
confiance.legal_desc: Title deed, building permits, management contracts — everything accessible before you buy.
confiance.secure_desc: Your payments go through an escrow account. Funds are only released when the funding target is reached.
confiance.transparency_desc: Rent, charges, occupancy rate, net revenue — you see exactly what your investment generates.
confiance.compliance_desc: Legal structure compliant with local regulations. Your co-ownership rights are guaranteed and traceable.
confiance.refund_desc: If the funding target is not reached within the allotted timeframe, your funds are automatically refunded.

cta_final.title: Ready to own a piece of Africa?
cta_final.subtitle: Join the first wave of FURSA investors. Premium properties, quarterly income, full liquidity.
cta_final.tagline: Fully managed. Fully rentable. Fully yours.
